steps.title: Use the area scale factor
steps.content:
For similar figures, if side lengths are multiplied by $k$, areas are multiplied by $k^2$. Here the side length scale factor is $7$, so the area scale factor is
$$7^2=49$$

steps.title: Multiply the original area
steps.content:
The area of ABCD is $98$ square units. Multiply by the area scale factor.
$$98(49)=4{,}802$$
The answer is D.
